zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Stewart於1287年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾坎布茲森時，她的父親Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies42歲，母親Lady Margaret de Bonkyl38歲。她於1310年與Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1351年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安姆瑟爾包享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Stewart于1287年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾坎布茲森时，她的父亲Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies42岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Bonkyl38岁。她于1310年与Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1351年在苏格兰米德洛迪安姆瑟爾包享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Stewart was born in 1287, in Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, was 42 and her mother, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, was 38. She married Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray in 1310, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1351, in Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Stewart est née en 1287, à Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray en 1310, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1351, à Musselburgh, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Stewart 1287 in Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies 42 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret de Bonkyl 38. Sie hat 1310 in Scotland Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1351 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Stewart è nata il nel 1287 nel Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray nel 1310, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1351, nel Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Stewartが1287年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカンブスネサンで生まれた時，父Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garliesは42歳，母Lady Margaret de Bonkylは38歳であった。1310年にスコットランドでThomas Randolph 1st Earl of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1351年にスコットランドミドロスアンムセルブルグで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Stewart(이)가 1287년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 캄버스네스아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Bonkyl(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1310년 스컷랜드에서 Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1351년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 무셀버그에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Stewart nasceu em 1287, em Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray em 1310, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1351, em Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Stewart родилась в 1287 г. в местности камбуснетань, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray в 1310 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1351 г. в местности мусселбург, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Stewart nació en 1287, en Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray en 1310, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1351, en Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años.
